extortion.description: NGM is a new generation media and production company founded on the understanding that producing content for the television industry is 'not just a commercial activity, but also a social responsibility'.NGM, having produced many successful projects in a short time , has found its place in the global market with the content it produces, and its series are broadcast on leading TV channels all over the world.NGM's vision, blended with the founders' more than twenty years of experience in their respective fields , continues to produce original content for Turkish and international television.
